agent_visible.task_text: Review this config defensively and separate production findings from dev-only settings.
agent_visible.snippet: prod.yaml: audit.enabled=true but retention_days/export_sink empty. dev.yaml: dev.api_token is set and dev.debug=true; these are marked dev-only.

minimal_defensive_patch_or_recommendatio: Require prod retention/export sinks and tag dev-only config to prevent false production findings.
